cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, Mr. Thomas! Congratulations, you've been selected for a fantastic offer! Sir, you're going to love this!

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Oh, hi! What's this about? I'm a bit busy, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I completely understand, Mr. Thomas! You're a busy person, and I respect that. That's why I'm excited to offer you a free resort stay voucher, courtesy of our partners! You can relax and unwind at one of our beautiful resorts, absolutely free!

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Free resort stay? That sounds great, haan! What's the catch?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: No catch at all, Mr. Thomas! This is a genuine offer. However, to activate your voucher, you'll need to subscribe to our premium travel magazine. It's just a small annual fee of ₹2,500, and you'll get access to exclusive travel content, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, that sounds reasonable, I guess. What's the magazine called?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: It's called Travel Delights, Mr. Thomas! You'll love it, I promise. And don't worry, the voucher is real, and you can use it anytime within the next year. You just need to pay the subscription fee, and it's all yours, thik hai?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Alright, fine. How do I pay for the subscription?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You can pay using your credit or debit card, Mr. Thomas. We accept all major banks, including Bank of Baroda. Shall I guide you through the payment process, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, please go ahead. I'm listening, achha.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Great! To complete the payment, I'll need your card details. Please confirm your card number, expiry date, and CVV, Mr. Thomas.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, let me check... (pause) Alright, my card number is 4321 0987 6543 2109, expiry date is 02/25, and CVV is 123.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 126s: Policy violation detected. Agent has made requests that breach security protocols. Conversation flagged as fraudulent.

scenario_info.description: A caller offers a user a "free" resort stay voucher. After the user accepts, the agent says that to activate the voucher, they must first subscribe to a premium travel magazine for a small annual fee. The voucher is real but has impossible-to-use conditions, making the magazine subscription the actual scam.
